author: maxine--plan-050
content: Result: Gap analysis complete. Revised against origin/develop which has PRs #294, #295, #296 merged. 4 of 10 REQs already implemented. Remaining work: REQ-1 (knowledge section edits, blocking), REQ-2 (kickoff list, blocking), REQ-3 (TUI sync, blocking), REQ-7 (branch protection, advisory), REQ-8 (repo cleanup, advisory), REQ-10 (version bump, advisory). 19 subtasks estimated. 4 conflicts identified. Output in .kickoff-plan.json.
